title: bidens prestinaria
intro: Bidens prestinaria, also known as Bidens pilosa or 'Burmuda beggarticks', is a perennial herb in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to tropical regions of Africa, Asia, and Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils. The health benefits of Bidens prestinaria include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and prevent certain types of cancer. Bidens prestinaria can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
